title: T-039 — Scanner LP inventory query API (WH §13.1)
prompt:
# T-039 — Scanner LP inventory query API (WH §13.1)

PRD: docs/prd/05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md §13.1
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Implement `GET /api/warehouse/scanner/inventory` returning paginated LP list filtered by warehouse + optional product/status/qa_status/location with the §13.1 response shape. SLO <200 ms P95.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/app/api/warehouse/scanner/inventory/route.ts` + service `apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/scanner-inventory.ts`.
2. Query params: warehouse_id (required), product_id, status (default 'available'), qa_status (CSV, default 'PASSED,RELEASED'), location_id, offset, limit (default 50, max 200).
3. Response per §13.1 example: items[] + total + offset + limit.
4. RBAC: Scanner session-authenticated (T-041).
5. Uses composite FEFO index from T-011.

## Files
- apps/web/app/api/warehouse/scanner/inventory/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/api/warehouse/scanner/inventory/__tests__/route.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given 100 LPs across 2 warehouses, when GET filters warehouse_id=X, then only warehouse X LPs returned, paginated.
2. Given qa_status='PASSED' filter, when called, then only PASSED LPs are returned.
3. Given the request lacks a valid session token, when called, then 401 returned.
4. Given 100k LPs, when paginated, then P95 <200 ms.

## Test strategy
- RED: `apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/__tests__/scanner-inventory.test.ts` asserting filter combinations, pagination, auth gate, perf smoke.
- Run `pnpm --filter web test scanner-inventory`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not expose inventory_value here (RBAC-gated, T-045 handles).
- Do not skip session token validation.
- Do not allow limit > 200 (DoS risk).

## Dependencies
- T-002
- T-011
- T-012
